evals.prompt: I have a messy CSV export from a survey and want to analyze it in R Markdown. Please plan the project before we write any analysis code. I want Copilot to help later without reading one huge Rmd.
evals.expected_output: A planning-only response that creates a PLAN.md structure, recommends atomic Rmd units, keeps calculation and interpretation adjacent, includes renv setup, and defines cache/provenance conventions.

evals.prompt: Set up a Python notebook analysis project for customer churn data. I expect EDA, a model, and a final report, but I want the notebooks split so an AI agent can revise one section at a time.
evals.expected_output: A plan with notebook-sized atomic analysis units, data/cache/src/report folders, setup/validation/bootstrap script plan, and a bounded handoff prompt for the later modeling skill.

evals.prompt: We are doing a reproducible Quarto analysis with expensive model fitting. I need a plan that prevents stale interpretation when formulas or input data change.
evals.expected_output: A Quarto-oriented plan that recommends freeze or targets where appropriate, explicit persisted model outputs, metadata or digest hashes, and interpretation located beside result chunks before final aggregation.
